title: opt_dff: Change AD to const if it's identical or complementary to ALOAD

features.name: async_load_dff_with_conditional_load
features.description: Code should include an always block with async load sensitivity list where data assignment is conditional on the async load signal
features.snippet: always @(posedge CLK, posedge aload) begin if (aload) Q <= ad; else if (CE == 1'b1) Q <= DIN; end

features.name: aload_signal_from_preset_reset_logic
features.description: Code should include an async load signal derived from OR of preset and reset conditions

features.name: ad_signal_from_preset_comparison
features.description: Code should include an async data signal derived from preset comparison with polarity

features.name: parametrizable_async_load_dff_module
features.description: Code should include a DFF module with parameterized async load logic using INIT_STATE, ASYNC_SOURCE, and POLARITY parameters
features.snippet: parameter INIT_STATE = 1'b1; parameter ASYNC_SOURCE = 1'b1; parameter POLARITY = 1'b1; wire preset; assign preset = INIT_STATE == 1'b0 ? por_init : async_init;
